content: اَلْوَلَد دَه رِيحَتُه مَعْفِنَة، أَكِيد مِش بِيِسْتَحَمَّا
translations: eng:this kid smells bad, surely he doesn't bathe

transcriptions.arabizi: ilwalad dah reeht|uh maAffina, 'akeed mish biyistahamma
